today_progress.focus: Completed full YOLO11 training on GPU and replaced the quick baseline with best-checkpoint held-out evaluation.
work_completed: Trained YOLO11s for 100 epochs on the exported detector view from COCO train2017 using CUDA.
Selected the best checkpoint from training (`best.pt`) instead of using the final epoch checkpoint.
Ran clean held-out evaluation on `test_real_heldout` and exported the result to `artifacts/reports/yolo11-best-eval.json`.
Updated Phase 1 summary to supersede the earlier quick-baseline-only metrics.

observations: This summary supersedes the earlier quick YOLO baseline (mAP around 0.32) and reflects full training + held-out evaluation.
The model remains substantially stronger on mugs than books, indicating class imbalance and/or harder book localization cases.
Training peaked mid-run, so checkpoint selection matters; best-checkpoint evaluation is the authoritative result.

today_issues_and_blockers: Grounding DINO pipeline remains blocked pending explicit model wiring or a test predictor.
Florence-2 pipeline remains blocked pending explicit model wiring or a test predictor.
Book-class AP remains the main quality bottleneck for detector parity across classes.
next_steps: Use the saved best checkpoint for inference/evaluation workflows instead of the final epoch checkpoint.
Run targeted improvements for book-class recall and AP (class balance, hard-example mining, augmentation tuning).
Re-run comparative evaluation when Florence-2 and Grounding DINO live paths are unblocked.
